name: Action1
description: Patch management and endpoint management platform. Monitor vulnerability status, patch compliance, and device inventory.

config.setupInstructions:
Setup steps:

1. Log in to your Action1 Console
   - North America: https://app.action1.com
   - Europe: https://app.eu.action1.com
   - Australia: https://app.au.action1.com

2. Create API Credentials:
   - Click the gear icon (Settings) in the top-right
   - Go to API Credentials
   - Click Add to create new credentials
   - Important: the credential must have Administrator role
   - Copy the Client ID and Client Secret (secret is only shown once)

3. Find your Organization ID:
   - After logging in, look at the URL in your browser
   - Find the ?org= parameter (e.g., https://app.action1.com/console/dashboard?org=12345)
   - The number after ?org= is your Organization ID

4. Select your Region:
   - us - North America
   - eu - Europe
   - au - Australia

credentialFields.label: Region
credentialFields.helpText: Enter your Action1 region: us (North America), eu (Europe), or au (Australia).

credentialFields.label: API Client ID
credentialFields.helpText: From Action1 Console: Settings (gear icon) > API Credentials > Add. Copy the Client ID shown after creation.

credentialFields.label: API Client Secret
credentialFields.helpText: The Client Secret generated alongside the Client ID. This is only shown once at creation time.

credentialFields.label: Organization ID
credentialFields.helpText: Optional. Your Action1 Organization ID from the ?org= parameter in the URL (e.g., ?org=12345). Leave blank to auto-detect from your account.

checks.name: Action1 Asset Inventory
checks.description: Lists all managed endpoints in your Action1 organization to verify endpoint inventory is actively tracked.

checks.name: Action1 Vulnerability Management
checks.description: Checks vulnerability scan data in Action1 to verify that vulnerability management is active and scanning endpoints.

checks.name: Action1 Patch Validation
checks.description: Checks for missing updates across managed endpoints to verify patch management is active.

checks.name: Action1 Device Configuration
checks.description: Checks that device configuration policies are defined and actively applied to managed endpoints.
